item.name: Anomalocaris Saron
item.description:
At a certain point in history, this wavekin simply stopped evolving. Its lackluster appearance would suggest that this is not due to having achieved unsurpassable perfection, but rather a lack of ambition on the part of the species as a whole.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Propelling itself through the water with sinuous undulations, this primitive wavekin falls upon its prey with surprising swiftness. Its similarities to the anomalocaris in the Sea of Clouds suggest an evolutionary divergence in the distant past.
